description: You are the Clinical Data Manager for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). A new protocol amendment requires an updated Physical Exam form (v2.0), but this amendment is currently only approved by the local IRB at the 'Boston Medical Center' site. Log in to OpenClinica (root / Admin123!) and update the 'Baseline Assessment' event at the 'Boston Medical Center' site so that the 'Physical Exam' CRF uses 'v2.0' as its default version. Ensure this change is only applied at the site level and not at the parent study level ('Phase II Diabetes Trial'), as other sites must remain on v1.0.
